sites.description: PaN-Training – testing catalogue with testing material
Galaxy Training Network – large catalogue of bioinformatics tutorials

sites.notes: Mix of LearningResource and CourseInstance; tests both @types in one run.

sites.notes: UK-focused events; tests location handling and organizer extraction.
